signals.name: Mild Form Edge -> Home

signals.name: Home Consistency Edge -> Home
signals.note: Home 10g diff >+5 AND 5g diff >+5. Sustained dominance, not a fluke. Strong ATS signal.

signals.note: Diff edge between 5 and 8 pts. Bridge between S5 and S11 for medium-strength signals.

signals.note: Both teams >60% 10g WR. Home court advantage dominates. Reliable when two top-tier teams meet.
